rankings.title: Banking the Unbanked Village: How Bank Branch Arrival Reshaped India's Rural Enterprise Landscape, 1990-2013
conditions: re-centering the design on policy-induced branch quotas/underbanked-district exposure rather than simple branch-arrival DiD
showing flat pre-trends
resolving village matching
boundary-change issues

rankings.title: Community Health Workers at Scale: India's ASHA Program and the Neonatal Mortality Transition
Does Public Health Insurance Reduce Financial Vulnerability? Evidence from India's Ayushman Bharat Using NFHS Fieldwork Timing
Banking the Unbanked Village: How Bank Branch Arrival Reshaped India's Rural Enterprise Landscape, 1990-2013
Community Health Workers at Scale: India's ASHA Program and the Neonatal Mortality Transition
conditions: shifting focus entirely to the district-level triple-difference
finding a highly counter-intuitive mechanism. Otherwise
it is a field journal paper at best

rankings.title: Does Public Health Insurance Reduce Financial Vulnerability? Evidence from India's Ayushman Bharat Using NFHS Fieldwork Timing
Community Health Workers at Scale: India's ASHA Program and the Neonatal Mortality Transition
conditions: reframing the treatment as the broader NRHM/JSY/ASHA package unless ASHA-specific variation can be isolated
showing long pre-trends using SRS
building a stronger within-state intensity or placebo strategy
